mapper.select: SELECT w.wiki_page_id, w.project_id, w.parent_page_id, w.title, w.current_version, w.user_code, w.created_at, w.update_at, u.user_name FROM wiki_pages w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.user_code = u.user_code WHERE w.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY w.created_at ASC

SELECT w.wiki_page_id, w.project_id, w.parent_page_id, w.title, w.content, w.current_version, w.user_code, w.lock_user_code, w.locked_at, w.created_at, w.update_at, u.user_name FROM wiki_pages w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.user_code = u.user_code WHERE w.wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_pages ( wiki_page_id, project_id, parent_page_id, title, content, current_version, user_code, created_at, update_at ) VALUES ( 'WP-' || wiki_page_id_seq.NEXTVAL, #{projectId}, #{parentPageId}, #{title}, #{content,jdbcType=CLOB}, 1, #{userCode}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT h.wiki_history_id, h.wiki_page_id, h.wiki_version, h.title, h.user_code, h.created_at, u.user_name FROM wiki_histories h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.user_code = u.user_code WHERE h.wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId} ORDER BY h.wiki_version DESC
SELECT wiki_history_id, wiki_page_id, wiki_version, title, content, user_code, created_at FROM wiki_histories WHERE wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId} AND wiki_version = #{wikiVersion}
